setup_instructions: 1. Go to https://console.green-api.com and create a free account
2. Click 'Create instance' — choose the Developer (free) plan
3. Copy your Instance ID and API Token from the instance dashboard
4. Click 'Scan QR code' and scan it with WhatsApp on your phone
5. Fill in phone (international format e.g. +201001234567), instance_id, and api_token below
